title: coleus gillettii
intro: Coleus gillettii, also known as the 'Dwarf Red Coleus', is a perennial plant species native to India, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Coleus gillettii can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in human use.
